---
title: "Sounds & Phonemes"
---
::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::


Slides: <span class="blue-badge">Sounds & Phonemes ↗</span>

Readings: <span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 3: *Sounds in the Brain*</span> <span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 4: *A neural code for speech*</span> <span class = "exam-badge">Mesgarani et al. 2014</span>
